_doc: Machine-readable baselines (consultant #23, #25). Three classifications: identity_gated (any drift = regression), behavior_gated (numeric thresholds documenting policy), documentary_snapshot (informational; expected to shift on declared milestones). Retired baselines kept for archaeology under `retired`.

identity_gated.name: M2_CANONICAL_SEQUENCE_TOTAL_TICKS
identity_gated._note: sum-of-WAIT-operands; semantic locked at M2.4. Wall-elapsed tick count is `total_elapsed_ticks` = 254 (consultant #1, M2.8).

behavior_gated.name: M2_AUDIBILITY_FLOORS
behavior_gated.rule: per-channel audible floor for at-least-one-channel-audible per SPEC §21

behavior_gated.name: M2_SOURCE_STEP_ZCR_RATIO_FLOOR
behavior_gated.rule: post.right.zcr / pre.right.zcr >= 1.5 in canonical source-step combined fixture

behavior_gated.name: M2_MODULE_CAP_BYTES
behavior_gated.rule: SPEC §15.6: module.bin > 32 KiB triggers ModuleTooLarge; <= 32 KiB ok

documentary_snapshot.name: M2_DRIVER_CODE_OBSERVED_BYTES
documentary_snapshot.snapshot_at: M2.5 (canonical M2 fixture, current asar version)
documentary_snapshot._note: informational; not gated. Expected to shift at M3 when driver gains features.

documentary_snapshot.name: M2_ATOM_128_SINE_BRR_SHA256
documentary_snapshot._note: M3 BRR-encoder-quality work expected to invalidate; reclassify as snapshot per consultant #26.

documentary_snapshot.name: M2_ATOM_64_SINE_BRR_SHA256
documentary_snapshot._note: M3 BRR encoder work expected to invalidate.

documentary_snapshot.name: M2_ATOM_128_SINE_PCM_SHA256
documentary_snapshot._note: M3-stable IF atom render formula unchanged (consultant #27).

documentary_snapshot.name: M2_ATOM_64_SINE_PCM_SHA256
documentary_snapshot._note: M3-stable IF atom render formula unchanged.

documentary_snapshot.name: M2_ATOM_128_SINE_LOOP_CLICK_SCORE
documentary_snapshot._note: |first_loop_decoded - last_decoded| with M2.2 BRR encoder + force_filter_0_first_block. Audible loop click expected; deferred to M3 BRR-quality (consultant #9).

documentary_snapshot.name: M2_ATOM_64_SINE_LOOP_CLICK_SCORE
documentary_snapshot._note: Same envelope as the 128 atom; higher absolute value reflects shorter cycle length.

retired.name: M2_MULTI_VOICE_ARAM_SHA256_M24
retired.reason: driver bytes shifted (KOFF-clear-before-KON, init_kon_mask, jmp main_loop fix; sequence_addr now points at payload not header)

retired.name: M2_MULTI_VOICE_ARAM_SHA256_M23
retired.reason: sequence_data region added between source directory and sample BRR pool
